case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. VS. DELIA P HOGAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT AND LOST ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A.
